summary: Pipeline is SOTA-quality for its core task (detect + mask + face-parse). All 24/24 status=ok. Recurring patterns identified; most are design tradeoffs, not bugs.

recurring_patterns.description: When expand_face_parts=true, sub-parts (skin/hair/eyes/lips) claim all pixels via z-priority. Parent 'person' layer becomes nearly empty (<3% pixels).
fix_options: A) Suppress parent layer from manifest when expand_face_parts=true (cleaner, breaks z-ordering semantics)
B) Add explicit 'body_remainder' layer capturing torso/neck/clothing not in face parts (better for compositing but more layers)
C) Accept — parent is visual 'hollow shell' showing where person was, sub-parts fill it
recurring_patterns.recommendation: B — add body_remainder automatically when sub-parts exist.

recurring_patterns.description: When face region is <50px (small figures in group photos), face-parsing returns empty sub-layers (eyebrows/ears/lips/eyes). Current FACE_PART_MIN_PX=80 sometimes lets these through.
fix_options: Raise FACE_PART_MIN_PX from 80 to 300 for background persons
Skip face-parsing entirely when person bbox area < 5% of image
recurring_patterns.recommendation: Raise threshold to 300 for non-primary persons.

recurring_patterns.description: DINO object detection occasionally returns bbox wider than intended (e.g. 'chair armrest' grabs arms + parapet).
fix_options: Tighter DINO prompts with explicit exclusions
Post-process: if object layer overlaps person layer >30%, subtract person region
recurring_patterns.recommendation: Add subtraction step in overlap resolution.

recurring_patterns.description: qingming-bridge is 2560x120 scroll; layers ARE correctly segmented by tile inference, but contact sheet thumbnails show them vertically centered with lots of empty space, making them look empty.
fix_options: Contact sheet: letterbox thin images differently (full-width at original aspect)
recurring_patterns.recommendation: Enhance contact sheet for extreme aspects (Tier 4).

successes: YOLO→DINO fallback works perfectly on paintings (previously failed)
Tile inference recovered qingming-bridge from 1/3 to 3/3
Face-parsing 2-pass extracts eyes/nose/lips/brows precisely on large faces (mona-lisa, migrant-mother mother, trump-portrait)
Detection report + status=partial flags qingming edge case correctly
Model caching makes 24-image batch complete in 4:23 (was 10:00+)
soften_mask smooths edges (visible under zoom, subtle at thumbnail scale)

before_after_edge_samples.observation: soften_mask produces slightly smoother alpha edges; visible under zoom

next_priority_recommendations.action: Add body_remainder layer when sub-parts exist (Pattern #1)
Tune FACE_PART_MIN_PX per-person based on bbox area (Pattern #2)
Post-process DINO objects to subtract person overlap (Pattern #3)
Review remaining 19 contact sheets for any unique issues
